name: casa-stock
description: Backend de control de compras y stock doméstico — Cloudflare Workers + D1

scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute casa-stock-db --local --file=./db/01_auth_schema_v1.1.sql && wrangler d1 execute casa-stock-db --local --file=./db/02_business_schema_v2.sql
scripts.db:prod: wrangler d1 execute casa-stock-db --file=./db/01_auth_schema_v1.1.sql && wrangler d1 execute casa-stock-db --file=./db/02_business_schema_v2.sql
scripts.db:tables: wrangler d1 execute casa-stock-db --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name"
